findings.title: Module uses 'unit' instead of 'unit_of_measure'
findings.issue: Variable named `unit` drops meaningful context per common/naming.md.
findings.why_it_matters: Standards require descriptive names that carry domain context.
findings.suggested_fix: Rename to `unit_of_measure` and update call sites.

findings.title: Tests shell out to system python instead of venv
findings.issue: Tests run via bare `python` instead of `$(PYTHON)` from venv.
findings.why_it_matters: Non-reproducible test env; CI will use the wrong interpreter.

findings.title: README missing install section
findings.issue: README doesn't explain how to install the package.
findings.suggested_fix: Add an `## Install` section with pip/npm instructions.

supplementary.tldr: Audited 2 subdomains; 3 gaps total. 1 critical in Makefile, 2 in naming/docs.

subdomain_notes.python: Makefile deviates from python/project-structure.md venv convention.
